title: Lead Investment Banker at HDFC Securities

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at HDFC Securities
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities:
HDFC Securities is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities!
